name: orbit-cli
description: Plumbing-only OpenClaw plugin that wraps Orbit's HTTP API + claw-side fetchers. 19 verbs covering observations, persons, meetings, topics, calendar/messages fetch, jobs, and onboarding backfill (raw_events, lid bridge, interactions). No LLM, no classification — transport only. Observer/resolver/brief/topic/backfill SKILLs own all interpretation.
